creator: sysseh@devetir.qld.gov.au
text:

Fix: 

Unknown....
-- 

        I do not speak for the Worker's Compensation Board of Queensland -
                     They don't pay me enough for that!
How-To-Repeat: 
	Run Linux emulation then fire up doom. Just as the xdoom sends a
	message to the sound server over a pipe, the system will crash.
	The panic message is "panic: LINUX newfstat"
	All lkms have been recompiled & installed.
